title: Simple & rapid genotyping of marine microeukaryotes
author: Jernej Turnšek
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jcdcis6

steps.instruction: --> volumes are per reaction --> x (number of strains + 2) undetermined, MQ undetermined, 10 µM forward primer undetermined, 10 µM reverse primer undetermined, Phire Plant Direct PCR Master Mix
--> Include appropriate positive (if available) and negative controls. --> Include WT or knockout strain you used for transformation as a template in one of the reactions.
--> 1:100 or 1:50 dilution into 10 mL fresh medium is a good place to start.
